Description.English: Adds several cheat commands to keybinds (see readme). Helpful to test mods or simply to cheat.

changelog.1.011: - Add keybind 'Shift;Home' to instant research the current active research (thanks JohnyBgood)
changelog.1.012: - Add keybind 'Alt;Delete' to delete (no ruin) current selected building/ship/unit even from other players. - Add keybind 'Shift;Delete' to destroy (ruin) current selected building/ship/unit even from other players (unknown if desync in Multiplayer). - Add keybind 'Control;Delete' to take over control of selected object (surely causes desync in Multiplayer)
